title: View booking list and open a booking detail from the list
description: Verifies an operator can log in, view the booking list, filter by today, and open a booking detail page.

steps.description: Click the first visible booking row in the list

title: Booking list loads after login and shows key list UI elements
description: Verifies the booking list page loads post-login and the primary list controls are visible.

steps.description: Verify element "Date" filter control is visible
Verify element "Create booking" button is visible

title: Switch booking list tabs (Day, Night, Unassigned) without navigation errors
description: Verifies switching between booking tabs updates the visible list section and stays on the booking list page.

title: Filter bookings to a date with no results and verify empty state
description: Verifies selecting a date with no bookings shows an empty-state message in the booking list.

steps.description: Select a date clearly far in the past (for example, a date several years ago) from the date picker

title: Open Create booking modal from empty state and verify it appears
description: Verifies the Create booking entry point works from an empty list and the booking form modal opens.

steps.description: Select a date clearly far in the past (for example, a date several years ago) from the date picker

title: Create booking validation: submit empty form shows required field errors
description: Verifies submitting the Create booking form with missing required fields shows visible validation errors.

title: Close Create booking modal without creating a booking
description: Verifies the user can dismiss the Create booking modal and return to the booking list.

steps.description: Verify text "Create booking" is not visible

title: Start then complete a booking from booking details
description: Verifies an operator can open a booking and successfully start and complete it, seeing visible status updates.

steps.description: Click a booking row in the booking list

title: Complete a started booking from booking details
description: Verifies a booking can be completed after it has been started, and the completed status is shown.

steps.description: Click a booking row in the booking list

title: Create a credit booking successfully and see success toast
description: Verifies an operator can open the credit booking form from the booking list and submit it successfully with a visible success confirmation.

title: Create a credit booking and verify it appears in the booking list
description: Verifies that after creating a credit booking, the operator can return to the booking list and see the newly created item present.

steps.description: Verify a booking list row for "Credit" is visible

title: Credit booking form rejects invalid fee and shows validation errors
description: Verifies the credit booking form blocks submission with an invalid fee value and shows visible validation feedback while staying on the form.

title: Credit booking form remains open after validation error
description: Verifies that after a validation failure, the user remains in the credit booking form and can still see the submit action.

steps.description: Verify element "Credit booking form" is visible

title: Customers directory loads with summary cards and customer table
description: Verifies an authenticated operator can open the Customers page and see the core UI elements (summary cards and the customers table).

steps.description: Click on "Customers" in the main navigation menu
Verify element "Customers" page heading is visible

title: Filter customers using search on Customers page
description: Verifies the search input filters the visible customer results in the directory table.

steps.description: Click on "Customers" in the main navigation menu
Type "a" into the customer search field
Verify element "Customers" results table is visible

title: Open Create customer modal from Customers page
description: Verifies the Create customer action opens a modal with a customer form.

steps.description: Click on "Customers" in the main navigation menu
Verify element "Create customer" modal dialog is visible

title: Cancel Create customer modal without saving
description: Verifies the user can dismiss the Create customer modal and return to the customers list without creating a record.

steps.description: Click on "Customers" in the main navigation menu
Click on the "Cancel" button in the modal
Verify element "Create customer" modal dialog is not visible

title: Create a customer with required fields and return to list
description: Verifies the happy path create customer workflow submits successfully and returns to the customers directory view.

steps.description: Click on "Customers" in the main navigation menu

title: Create customer with invalid email shows validation and stays in modal
description: Verifies invalid email input triggers visible validation errors and does not close the create modal.

steps.description: Click on "Customers" in the main navigation menu
Fill "Invalid Email Customer" into the "Name" field

title: Submitting create form with invalid email shows error and does not create customer
description: Verifies submitting the create form with an invalid email displays a validation message and the modal remains open.

steps.description: Click on "Customers" in the main navigation menu
Fill "Invalid Email Customer" into the "Name" field
Click on the "Create" or "Save" button in the modal
Verify element "Create customer" modal dialog is visible

title: Settle a valid amount from a customer balance and see updated balance
description: Verifies an operator can open a customer balance, settle a valid amount, and see confirmation plus an updated balance.

steps.description: Click on the "Customer balances" navigation item

title: Filter customer balances by name and verify results update
description: Verifies filtering the balances list by customer name updates visible results.

steps.description: Click on the "Customer balances" navigation item
Click into the "Name" or "Search" filter field
Type "a" into the "Name" or "Search" filter field

title: Open a customer detail modal from a balance row
description: Verifies clicking a customer row opens the customer detail modal with booking history context.

steps.description: Click on the "Customer balances" navigation item
Click the first customer row in the balances list

title: Settle amount flow: open modal, enter valid settlement, submit, and confirm success toast
description: Verifies the end-to-end settlement flow shows a success confirmation after submitting a valid amount.

steps.description: Click on the "Customer balances" navigation item
Click the first customer row in the balances list

title: Reject settlement when entered amount is greater than owed
description: Verifies validation/error feedback appears and settlement is not applied when amount exceeds amount owed.

steps.description: Click on the "Customer balances" navigation item
Click the first customer row in the balances list

title: Settlement cancel/close does not apply changes
description: Verifies closing the settlement flow without submitting does not show success confirmation.

steps.description: Click on the "Customer balances" navigation item
Click the first customer row in the balances list

title: Filtering then opening a customer row still opens correct detail modal
description: Verifies that after applying a name filter, selecting a row still opens a customer detail modal (no empty or mismatched modal state).

steps.description: Click on the "Customer balances" navigation item
Click into the "Name" or "Search" filter field
Type "e" into the "Name" or "Search" filter field
Click the first customer row in the balances list
Verify element "Customer detail modal" is visible

title: Create a new driver successfully from Drivers directory
description: Verifies that an authenticated operator can create a driver and see it appear in the Drivers list.

steps.description: Click on "Drivers" in the main navigation menu

title: Drivers page shows summary metrics and a driver table
description: Verifies that the Drivers directory loads and displays summary cards and a populated table area.

steps.description: Click on "Drivers" in the main navigation menu

title: Search for an existing driver from the Drivers directory
description: Verifies that searching filters the visible driver results in the table.

steps.description: Click on "Drivers" in the main navigation menu
Type "Ali" into the driver search field

title: Open Create Driver modal and verify required fields are present
description: Verifies that the create driver modal opens and shows key form fields and a submit action.

steps.description: Click on "Drivers" in the main navigation menu

title: Create Driver validation: missing required license field
description: Verifies that submitting the create driver form without a required license shows validation errors and keeps the modal open.

steps.description: Click on "Drivers" in the main navigation menu

title: Cancel out of Create Driver modal without saving
description: Verifies that the operator can close the create driver modal and return to the Drivers directory without creating a driver.

steps.description: Click on "Drivers" in the main navigation menu

title: Add a driver balance adjustment successfully from Driver Balances
description: Verifies an operator can add a balance adjustment and see success feedback and refreshed balances list.

steps.description: Click on "Driver balances" in the main navigation

title: Open Add balance form and submit a valid adjustment
description: Verifies the Add balance workflow accepts valid amount and description and shows a success message.

steps.description: Click on "Driver balances" in the main navigation

title: Validate required fields when adding a balance adjustment
description: Verifies submitting Add balance with missing fields shows visible validation feedback and does not succeed.

steps.description: Click on "Driver balances" in the main navigation

title: Prevent non-numeric amount when adding a balance adjustment
description: Verifies entering a non-numeric amount shows validation errors and does not add a balance adjustment.

steps.description: Click on "Driver balances" in the main navigation

title: Driver Leaves page loads and displays leave list
description: Verifies the driver leaves page is accessible and shows the leave list UI.

steps.description: Click on "Driver leaves" in the main navigation

title: Open a driver leave record to view details/history
description: Verifies a leave record can be opened from the list and a details/history view is shown.

steps.description: Click on "Driver leaves" in the main navigation
Click on the first leave record in the list

title: Driver Leaves page shows error feedback when leaves fail to load (if occurs)
description: Verifies that if the leaves list cannot be fetched, the page presents visible error feedback instead of a silent failure.

steps.description: Click on "Driver leaves" in the main navigation
Wait for the page content to finish loading

title: Create a new Day package with pricing and availability enabled
description: Verifies an operator can create a new package from the Packages page using the Day tab, set pricing, toggle availability, submit, and see the result reflected in the list.

steps.description: Click on "Packages" in the main navigation menu

title: Complete the Day package form and submit successfully
description: Verifies the create package sheet/form supports selecting category and Day type, filling pricing fields, setting availability, and submitting without visible errors.

steps.description: Click on "Packages" in the main navigation menu
Select a category from the category dropdown

title: Create a new Night package and verify it appears under Night tab
description: Verifies a Night-type package can be created and is visible when switching to the Night tab.

steps.description: Click on "Packages" in the main navigation menu
Click the "Night" tab in the package type selector

title: Toggle package availability during creation and verify state is shown in list
description: Verifies the availability toggle in the create form affects how the package is shown in the package list (e.g., Available/Unavailable indicator).

steps.description: Click on "Packages" in the main navigation menu
Click the availability toggle to change its state

title: Validation: submit with missing required pricing fields shows errors and stays in form
description: Verifies required pricing fields are validated and prevent submission when empty, showing visible validation feedback and keeping the user in the create package form.

steps.description: Click on "Packages" in the main navigation menu

title: Switch between Day and Night tabs in the list view
description: Verifies the Packages page supports switching between Day and Night tabs and shows tab-specific content without leaving the page.

steps.description: Click on "Packages" in the main navigation menu
Click the "Night" tab in the package list view

title: Cancel/close the create package sheet without saving
description: Verifies the create package sheet can be closed without creating a package and the user returns to the packages list view.

steps.description: Click on "Packages" in the main navigation menu
Click the "Cancel" button or the close icon on the create package sheet

title: Validation: after selecting a type, required fields for that type are visible
description: Verifies that selecting Day vs Night (or other available type tabs) reveals the type-specific pricing fields required for that package type.

steps.description: Click on "Packages" in the main navigation menu
Click the "Day" tab in the package type selector

title: Create consolidated invoice from selected bookings and see download link
description: Verifies an operator can create a consolidated invoice from selected bookings and sees a success state with a download link.

steps.description: Select multiple bookings in the booking list (use the row selection checkboxes)
Click the "Create invoice" or "Invoice" action to open the invoice creation UI

title: Consolidated invoice submission shows success confirmation
description: Verifies submitting the consolidated invoice request shows a visible success confirmation in the UI.

steps.description: Select multiple bookings in the booking list (use the row selection checkboxes)
Click the "Create invoice" or "Invoice" action to open the invoice creation UI
Click the "Submit" or "Create" button in the invoice creation UI

title: After successful invoice creation, download link is visible
description: Verifies the UI shows a visible download link after a successful consolidated invoice creation.

steps.description: Select multiple bookings in the booking list (use the row selection checkboxes)
Click the "Create invoice" or "Invoice" action to open the invoice creation UI
Click the "Submit" or "Create" button in the invoice creation UI

title: Prevent invoice creation when fewer than two bookings are selected
description: Verifies the UI blocks consolidated invoice creation when an insufficient number of bookings is selected.

steps.description: Select exactly one booking in the booking list (use a single row selection checkbox)

title: Authenticated entry loads booking and shows global navigation branding
description: Verifies that after logging in, the app lands on the authenticated area and displays the sidebar branding.

steps.description: Click on the "Sign in" or "Login" button

title: Navigate to Customers via sidebar and confirm breadcrumb location
description: Verifies sidebar navigation to Customers and that breadcrumb reflects the destination page.

steps.description: Click on the "Sign in" or "Login" button
Click on "Customers" in the sidebar navigation

title: Sidebar collapse and expand using the sidebar toggle
description: Verifies the sidebar can be collapsed and expanded and remains functional for navigation.

steps.description: Click on the "Sign in" or "Login" button

title: Theme toggle changes theme control state and keeps current page
description: Verifies the theme toggle is available in global navigation and does not navigate away from the current route.

steps.description: Click on the "Sign in" or "Login" button

title: Navigate across multiple sections using sidebar (Customers -> Drivers)
description: Verifies global navigation supports moving between major sections without losing navigation UI.

steps.description: Click on the "Sign in" or "Login" button
Click on "Customers" in the sidebar navigation
Click on "Drivers" in the sidebar navigation

title: Breadcrumb remains visible and updates when navigating to Reports
description: Verifies breadcrumb presence and that it reflects the page after navigation.

steps.description: Click on the "Sign in" or "Login" button
Click on "Reports" in the sidebar navigation

title: Graceful handling when attempting to access an unavailable route is not testable via static routes
description: Ensures tests do not attempt to validate missing/404 linked routes because no concrete missing route is provided in the route list.

steps.description: Click on the "Sign in" or "Login" button
